CalifOrnia
Fair Political
Practices Cornmission
June 20, 1990
Paul chrisman
Hyde, Miller & Savage
428 J Street, Suite 4oo
Sacramento, cA 954L4
Re: Your Reguest for confirmation of
Telephone Advice
Our Fil-e No. I-9 0-3 94
Dear Mr. chrisman:
We have received your letter dated May 31, 1990 which appears
to seek written confirmation of telephone advice provj-ded to you
by this agency on May 30, 1990, generally regarding the responsi-
bilities 
of an employee of your client, a county in a redevelop-
ment project, under the confLict of interest provisions of the
political 
Reform Act (r'the Actrr).1 The advice that was provided
to you was limited to the provisions of the Act and did not ad-
dress other conflict of interest laws whj-ch might be applicable to
your query. Becuase your request does not appear to involve a
specific pending decision, $re are treating it as one for informal
a-ssistance only, pursuant to Regulation 18329(c) (copy enclosed) .2
The advice provided to you was prenised on the specific facts
you provided in the telephone conversation, to wit: an assistant
planner enployed by the county was contemplating a real estate
purchase in a redevelopment area, the employee's duties included
providing assistance to an outside consultant with respect to the
preparation of the redevelopment plan for the county's board of
lupervisors, and the functions pertaininq to the enployees job
duties did not involve the exercise of dj.scretion and were, in-
stead, rtmore or less'r ministerial.
on the basis of these facts, you lrere advised that the em-
ployee did not appear to have a conflict of interest under the
1 co.r".r,*"nt Code Sections 81OOO-91015. At1 statutory references
are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. 
commission
regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section
18OOO, et seq, ALl references to regulations are to Title 2,
Division 6 of the California Code of Regul-ations.
2 Informal assistance does not provide the requestor $/ith the
innunity provided by an opinion or formal written advice. (section
83114; Regulation 18329 (c) (3) . )
428 J Street, Suite 8OO . P.O. Box 8O7 o Sacramento CA 95804.0807 o (9f 6)322-5660


File No. I-9 O-3 94
Page 2
Act. 
You were also advised that the duties of the employee would
determine whether he $rouLd be reguired to refrain fron participat-
ing in decisions concerning the redevelopment area after the close
of escrow for the real estate purchase. Your letter recognized
that such a job description would be necessary in order for this
question to be addressed. Because no information with respect to
Juch duties hras provided, we were unabl-e to provj-de you with ad-
vice on this question.
I trust this letter has provided you e/j-th the guidance you
requested. If you have any further questions regarding this mat-
ter, please contact ne at (916) 322'5907.
Sincerely,
scott EalLabrin
Acting General counsel
